name: Mystery On Lost Island
short_description: Mystery On Lost Island is a low-poly first-person-shooter with a story game mode where you're shooting dinosaurs, trying to find your missing friend and escape an uncharted island, and a wave survival mode where you fight hordes of dinosaurs on different maps.
detailed_description:
Find your friend. Stay alive. Escape the island.

Mystery On Lost Island is a low-poly first-person-shooter action survival game where you'll be sneaking and shooting your way through forests, canyons, mountains and more to find your missing friend and escape the island with your life!

This single-player FPS game is set on an uncharted island overrun with dinosaurs where You'll have to sneak through forests, use the guns you find to blast raptors and other dinosaurs and uncover the mystery of your missing friend.

Story

You are Jacob Taylor. Your friend, a military agent, was sent on a secret mission to an uncharted island. He won't tell you why, but he said he was suspicious of the whole thing.
After a few days you try to call him but he doesn't answer. Later you get a call from him but the connection is bad and all you heard him say was, "Jacob...they're coming...everybody's gone...I barely escaped...there's no way off this island...", before the call was dropped.

Highlights

  • Story mode
  • Wave survival mode
  • Levels and maps across multiple different settings
  • Dinosaurs!
